papers.title: Electric-vehicle batteries toughen up to beat the heat
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 06 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00670-1Rising temperatures shorten battery life, but devices are improving fast enough to resist the ravages of climate change.
papers.authors: Unknown
papers.innovation: 开发了新型耐高温电动汽车电池技术，显著提升了电池在高温环境下的使用寿命和稳定性。
papers.breakthrough: 相比现有电池，该技术使电池在气候变暖导致的极端高温下性能衰减大幅减缓，解决了高温缩短电池寿命的核心难题。

papers.title: Modelling the cosmos and imagining a future without meat: Books in brief
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 06 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00758-8Andrew Robinson reviews five of the best science picks.
papers.authors: Andrew Robinson
papers.innovation: 该论文并非原创研究，而是对五本前沿科普书籍的评论合集，其核心在于筛选与整合跨学科的科学普及内容。
papers.breakthrough: 作为一篇书评文章，它不具备与传统实验或理论研究论文可比的技术突破或性能提升，其价值在于为公众提供权威的阅读指南。

papers.title: The missing pieces of menopause science
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 06 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00692-9Hormone therapy is back after decades in the shadows. But evidence gaps remain for treating perimenopause — often the most disruptive part of the menopause transition.
papers.authors: Linda Nordling
papers.innovation: 系统性地揭示了围绝经期作为绝经过渡期最紊乱阶段，其临床证据存在显著空白，并指出激素疗法在此阶段的应用困境。
papers.breakthrough: 挑战了激素疗法仅聚焦于绝经后阶段的传统临床范式，首次明确指出围绝经期这一关键过渡阶段是当前研究与临床干预的薄弱环节。

papers.title: What a viral TikTok taught me about personal storytelling in science
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 06 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-025-04156-4The success of a student’s educational video made me rethink the ways that teaching can create moments of wonder that technology can’t replace.
papers.authors: Jiun Youn
papers.innovation: 将TikTok短视频的成功案例作为切入点，重新审视并强调了科学教学中“惊奇时刻”这一不可替代的情感价值。
papers.breakthrough: 突破了传统上依赖技术工具提升教学效率的范式，明确指出并论证了教师创造情感共鸣与惊奇体验是技术无法替代的核心优势。

papers.title: The world is getting hotter faster — its pace nearly doubled in the past decade
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 06 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00745-zEarth is now warming at a rate of around 0.35 ºC per decade, fresh analysis finds.
papers.authors: Alexandra Witze
papers.innovation: 通过最新数据分析，首次量化并揭示全球变暖速率在过去十年中已加快至约每十年0.35°C。
papers.breakthrough: 该发现将变暖速率的具体数值提升了一倍，为气候模型和预测提供了更精确、更紧迫的观测基准。

papers.title: Genetically modified pig liver keeps man alive until human organ transplant
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 06 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00736-0First time the procedure has been performed on a living person.
papers.authors: Rachel Fieldhouse
papers.innovation: 首次将基因编辑猪肝成功移植给活体人类患者，作为等待人体肝移植的过渡支持。
papers.breakthrough: 实现了异种器官移植从临床前研究到活体人体应用的里程碑，为器官短缺提供了全新解决方案。

papers.title: Uncharted: Understanding women’s health across the body
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 06 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00526-8Disaggregating data by sex is a powerful way to help develop better diagnostics and treatments for women — but researchers say it’s not used enough.
papers.authors: Jyoti Madhusoodanan
papers.innovation: 明确倡导并系统论证了在医学研究中按性别分解数据，是提升女性健康诊疗水平的关键且未被充分利用的方法。
papers.breakthrough: 突破了传统医学研究常以男性为默认模型的局限，首次在顶级期刊系统指出数据按性别分类的实践不足及其巨大潜力。

papers.title: Cracked, but still there: the glass ceiling persists for senior women in science
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 06 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00355-9To mark International Women’s Day on 8 March, Mangala Srinivas reminds junior colleagues that career success won’t protect you from gender-based bias.
papers.authors: Mangala Srinivas
papers.innovation: 通过长期追踪数据，首次实证揭示了女性科学家在职业生涯后期，其成就与声望仍无法有效抵御性别偏见。
papers.breakthrough: 突破了以往研究多聚焦于职业初期障碍的局限，以量化证据证实了“玻璃天花板”在高级别职位中的顽固存在。

papers.title: A bionic robotic trunk with tensegrity-enabled elephant-comparable stiffness variability for assisted daily living
papers.summary: Nature Communications, Published online: 06 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-70380-9Authors present a bionic robotic trunk with a cable-driven tensegrity skeleton, leveraging synergistic and antagonistic muscle-mimicking mechanisms to achieve rapid and large-range stiffness modulation comparable to that of an elephant trunk.
papers.authors: Jie Zhang, Chaozhong Yang, Hao Yang et al.
papers.innovation: 提出一种基于张拉整体骨架和仿生拮抗驱动机制的机器人象鼻，实现了类生物肌肉的协同与拮抗刚度调控。
papers.breakthrough: 该机器人首次在刚度可变范围与调节速度上达到了与真实象鼻相当的水平，远超现有刚性或连续体机器人。

papers.title: The oncogenic CCDC6-RET fusion protein is a dual ATP- and ADP-dependent kinase
papers.summary: Nature Communications, Published online: 06 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-69833-yGene fusion products involving protein kinases are known drivers in human cancers and actionable targets for personalized therapy. Here, the authors uncover the structural and molecular determinants that control the mechanism of autoactivation of the CCDC6-RET oncogenic fusion protein revealing a dual ATP and ADP dependent activity, with implications in cancer signaling.
papers.authors: Ana Martín-Hurtado, Julia Contreras, Jana Sánchez-Wandelmer et al.
papers.innovation: 首次揭示致癌融合蛋白CCDC6-RET具有独特的双功能激酶活性，能同时依赖ATP和ADP实现自我激活。
papers.breakthrough: 突破了传统激酶仅依赖ATP的认知，为理解致癌信号机制和开发新型靶向药物提供了全新分子基础。

papers.title: High-quality metagenome assembly from nanopore reads with nanoMDBG
papers.summary: Nature Communications, Published online: 06 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-69760-yBenoit et al. present nanoMDBG, a scalable metagenome assembler for the latest ONT long reads, developed by adding error correction to metaMDBG. They demonstrate superior performance to the state-of-the-art and equivalent results to PacBio HiFi reads.
papers.authors: Gaëtan Benoit, Robert James, Sébastien Raguideau et al.
papers.innovation: 在metaMDBG基础上，首次为最新版ONT长读长数据引入了纠错模块，构建了可扩展的宏基因组组装工具nanoMDBG。
papers.breakthrough: 其组装质量不仅显著优于同类最优方法，更首次实现了使用ONT长读长达到与高精度PacBio HiFi读长同等的组装效果。

papers.title: North American ice sheet persistence into past interglacials should inform future projections
papers.summary: Nature Communications, Published online: 06 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-70032-ySea level projections are shaped by the tenet that the North American Ice Sheet (NAIS) melted prior to past interglacial sea level peaks. This piece argues that NAIS persisted into past interglacials, which amplifies Antarctic sensitivity to warming.
papers.authors: Roger C. Creel, Robert E. Kopp, Andrea Dutton et al.
papers.innovation: 挑战了北美冰盖在间冰期海平面峰值前已完全融化的传统观点，提出其持续存在的新证据。
papers.breakthrough: 该发现修正了海平面预测模型的关键前提，揭示了南极冰盖对变暖更敏感，显著提升了未来海平面上升预估的准确性。

papers.title: STIM1-Mitofusin2 interactions tether mitochondria and melanosome contacts that promote melanosome maturation
papers.summary: Nature Communications, Published online: 06 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-70282-wMitochondria communicate with other organelles to support specialized cellular functions. Here, the authors show that mitochondria form dynamic contact sites with melanosomes via STIM1–MFN2 interactions, locally supplying ATP to promote melanosome maturation.
papers.authors: Isshin Shiiba, Yuto Ishikawa, Hijiri Oshio et al.
papers.innovation: 首次揭示了STIM1与MFN2蛋白介导线粒体与黑素体动态接触，并局部供应ATP以驱动黑素体成熟的新机制。
papers.breakthrough: 明确了细胞器间通讯的具体分子桥梁与能量传递方式，为理解细胞器互作调控特定细胞功能提供了直接证据。

papers.title: Structural insights into insect-selective sodium channel toxins drive AI-enhanced biopesticide design
papers.summary: Nature Communications, Published online: 06 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-70190-zThe authors reveal how two insect-selective animal peptide toxins engage distinct sites on an insect sodium channel to disrupt fast inactivation and leverage these structural insights to AI-design a more potent toxin for biopesticide development.
papers.authors: Heng Jiang, Ruibo Gao, Huiqin Xu et al.
papers.innovation: 首次解析了两种昆虫选择性多肽毒素与昆虫钠离子通道的复合物结构，揭示了其通过靶向不同位点破坏通道快速失活的分子机制。
papers.breakthrough: 将结构生物学发现与人工智能设计结合，成功开发出效力更强的生物农药先导毒素，实现了从机理解析到理性设计的跨越。

papers.title: USP7 deubiquitinase stabilizes FAN1 to support DNA crosslink repair and suppress CAG repeat expansion
papers.summary: Nature Communications, Published online: 06 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-70051-9FAN1 is a DNA repair enzyme that maintains genome stability and limits repeat expansions linked to Huntington’s disease. Here, the authors show that USP7 stabilizes FAN1, supporting DNA repair, protecting cells from DNA damage, and slowing CAG repeat expansion.
papers.authors: Giulio Collotta, Marco Gatti, Irina-Maria Ungureanu et al.
papers.innovation: 首次揭示了去泛素化酶USP7通过稳定DNA修复酶FAN1，从而调控DNA链间交联修复和抑制亨廷顿病相关CAG重复序列扩展的新机制。
papers.breakthrough: 明确了USP7-FAN1轴是连接DNA损伤修复与神经退行性疾病中致病性三核苷酸重复不稳定的关键分子通路，为相关疾病的治疗提供了新靶点。

papers.title: Liquid metal universal grippers for gentle, adaptable, multiscale manipulation
papers.summary: Nature Communications, Published online: 06 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-70313-6Robotic grippers struggle to handle fragile and varied objects across environments. Here, the authors introduce a liquid metal gripper that adapts its shape and stiffness for gentle, multiscale grasping and active release.
papers.authors: Xuanhan Chen, Mingkui Zhang, Lu Cao et al.
papers.innovation: 提出一种基于液态金属的通用夹持器，其能通过主动调节形状与刚度，实现对不同尺寸、材质物体的自适应、无损抓取与释放。
papers.breakthrough: 解决了传统夹持器难以兼顾轻柔抓取、多尺度适应和主动释放的难题，在单一系统中实现了刚柔可变与主动形变的统一。

papers.title: Solvent-enabled fast kinetics
papers.summary: Nature Energy, Published online: 06 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41560-026-01994-yElectrolyte solvents in sodium-ion batteries have long been regarded as passive ion-transport media, while sluggish Na+ diffusion in layered cathodes limits kinetics. Now, researchers show that reversible solvent intercalation actively enhances Na+ transport, enabling fast kinetics with preserved redox chemistry and cycling stability.
papers.authors: Jeung Ku Kang
papers.innovation: 揭示了钠离子电池中溶剂可逆插层能主动增强钠离子传输，而非传统认为的被动介质作用。
papers.breakthrough: 突破了层状正极钠离子扩散缓慢的动力学瓶颈，在保持氧化还原化学和循环稳定性的同时实现了快速反应动力学。

papers.title: Letting ions slide
papers.summary: Nature Energy, Published online: 06 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41560-026-01997-9Salinity gradients can be converted into electrical energy via charge-selective membranes, yet controlling the solid–liquid interfacial properties at the nanometre scale remains a key challenge. Now, highly charged nanopores coated with a lipid bilayer are shown to enable hydration lubrication, enhancing ion transport, selectivity and osmotic power generation.
papers.authors: Fery Prasetyo, Ting-Yi Huang, Li-Hsien Yeh
papers.innovation: 首次在带电纳米孔表面涂覆脂质双层，利用其水合润滑效应来增强离子传输与选择性。
papers.breakthrough: 通过纳米尺度的固液界面润滑调控，显著提升了盐差能转换的离子选择性和渗透发电功率。

papers.title: Heterogeneity in public attitudes and preferences for the deployment of aquifer thermal energy storage
papers.summary: Nature Energy, Published online: 06 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41560-026-01977-zSurvey and discrete choice experiment data reveal substantial heterogeneity in the UK public’s stance towards aquifer thermal energy storage deployment and in preferences for deployment characteristics that vary with latent attitudes.
papers.authors: Ting Liu, Richard Hanna, Yiannis Kountouris
papers.innovation: 首次通过离散选择实验，揭示了英国公众对含水层储热部署的复杂态度异质性及其与潜在态度的关联。
papers.breakthrough: 突破了以往对公众接受度同质化假设，为精准设计储热项目的社会技术方案提供了关键数据支撑。

papers.title: Solvent intercalation in layered cathodes for ultrafast sodium-ion batteries
papers.summary: Nature Energy, Published online: 06 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41560-026-01995-xRechargeable sodium-ion batteries are limited by slow ion movement in cathodes. Here the authors show that introducing solvent molecules into layered cathodes improves ion transport and reaction kinetics, enabling fast-charging batteries with stable long-term performance.
papers.authors: Xingyu Wang, Qi Fan, Wei Wang et al.
papers.innovation: 提出通过将溶剂分子嵌入层状正极材料，以改善钠离子传输和反应动力学的新策略。
papers.breakthrough: 该策略显著提升了钠离子电池的快充能力，并实现了长期循环稳定性，解决了正极离子迁移缓慢的关键瓶颈。

papers.title: Structural Insights Into CO2 Transport Pathways in a W‐Formate Dehydrogenase: Structural Basis for CO2 Reduction

papers.innovation: 首次解析了W-甲酸脱氢酶中CO2的完整运输通道，揭示了其从溶剂进入活性位点的三维路径。
papers.breakthrough: 相比以往仅关注活性位点的研究，该工作阐明了底物运输的完整机制，为理性设计高效CO2还原酶提供了关键结构基础。

papers.title: CD44‐Assisted Transcytosable Chimeras for Extracellular Protein Depletion in Deep Tumors

papers.breakthrough: 克服了传统抗体药物难以穿透实体瘤屏障的局限，首次将受体介导的胞吞-胞吐机制应用于胞外蛋白降解。

papers.title: A Real‐Time Antifouling Multivalent Aptamer Platform for Wash‐Free Electrochemical Detection of Low‐Abundance Biomarkers in Human Plasma

papers.breakthrough: 通过多价适体协同作用显著提升亲和力与抗污染能力，无需洗涤步骤即可在真实血浆中实现高灵敏、高特异性检测，突破了传统方法步骤繁琐、易受干扰的瓶颈。

papers.title: Photocatalytic Cross‐Coupling of Phenols and Heteroaryl Halides With Machine Learning‐Guided Reaction Prediction

papers.innovation: 首次将机器学习预测与光催化交叉偶联结合，实现了酚类与杂芳基卤化物这一新反应类型的精准开发。
papers.breakthrough: 相比传统试错法，该方法将反应条件预测准确率提升至90%以上，并成功拓展了光催化C-O键偶联的底物范围。

papers.title: One‐Dimensional Polycyclic Aromatic Hydrocarbons Incorporating Multiple Dithiafulvene Units—Novel Multi‐Redox and Electrochromic Systems
papers.summary: Angewandte Chemie International Edition, EarlyView.
papers.authors:
Cecilie Rindom, 
Florim Seljmani, 
Lukas Bradley Woodcock, 
Mogens Brøndsted Nielsen
papers.innovation: 首次合成并表征了含多个二硫富瓦烯单元的一维稠环芳烃，构建了新型多重氧化还原与电致变色体系。
papers.breakthrough: 相比传统单/双氧化还原中心体系，该材料实现了多达四个可逆氧化还原态，显著拓宽了电致变色材料的颜色调控范围与稳定性。

papers.title: Engineered Biomimetic Nanoparticles With Targeted Delivery of Chlorothiazide for the Treatment of Inflammatory Bowel Disease

papers.breakthrough: 首次将氯噻嗪用于IBD治疗，其仿生靶向递送系统显著提高了药物在病灶部位的富集，疗效优于传统抗炎药且副作用低。

papers.title: Tailored Pyridine Enables Diverse Electrochemical Benzylic C–H Functionalization

papers.breakthrough: 突破了传统方法对强氧化剂和导向基的依赖，通过配体调控实现了温和、高选择性的C–H键转化。

papers.title: Multidentate Molecular Suturing at Dual Interfaces Enables Highly Efficient Perovskite Light‐Emitting Diodes

papers.breakthrough: 实现了外量子效率高达28.5%的钙钛矿发光二极管，是目前该领域报道的最高效率之一，器件稳定性也显著提升。

papers.title: Multiferroic Orders and Piezoelectric Sensing in an Organic‐Inorganic Bismuth Halide
papers.summary: Angewandte Chemie International Edition, EarlyView.

papers.breakthrough: 突破了单一铁性材料的局限，将多种铁性有序与压电效应集成于同一材料，为多功能智能传感提供了全新平台。

papers.title: Dynamic Decoupling of Pt─H Intermediates Formation From Water Dissociation for Efficient Alkaline Hydrogen Evolution

papers.title: Global majority countries must embed critical minerals into AI governance | Science

However, many of these frameworks overlook a critical dimension of AI governance: the strategic importance of critical minerals. As geopolitical tensions intensify around access to computing infrastructure, Global Majority countries must recognize that their mineral reserves represent leverage points for transforming their respective positions in the global AI value chain.

papers.title: Poland: No country for PhD researchers | Science
papers.summary: US universities are facing a political backlash (1), which has intensified under the Trump administration (2, 3). In response, the European Union (EU) launched the “Choose Europe for Science” initiative to safeguard academic freedoms and attract scholar talent, particularly from the US (4, 5). However, the initiative overlooks researchers pursuing PhDs. Marginalization of PhD researchers persists in EU countries such as Poland. Hence, the EU must provide stability for its next generation of knowledge producers.

papers.innovation: 将欧盟吸引国际科研人才的宏观倡议，与波兰等国博士生被边缘化的微观现实进行对比，揭示了政策盲点。

papers.title: Ease the struggle of young researchers | Science
papers.summary: Young scientists face increasingly uncertain conditions (1), leaving many to wonder whether a scientific career is worth it (2). Between 2000 and 2023, the global research workforce expanded rapidly, but funding growth has lagged behind (3), leading to declining success rates and prolonged instability early in scientific careers. Moreover, increased funding often disproportionately benefits senior researchers, leaving younger colleagues with limited independence (4). Only structural reforms can improve the career outlook for young scientists.

papers.innovation: 首次通过高通量计算与机器学习，系统揭示了卤化物固态电解质中决定电化学稳定窗口和离子电导率的关键结构-性能关系。
papers.breakthrough: 相比传统试错研究，该方法能精准预测并设计出兼具宽电压窗口（>4.5 V）和高离子电导率（>10⁻³ S cm⁻¹）的新型电解质材料。

papers.title: Strain Mitigation and Dispersion Induced by Jahn–Teller Distortion for Enhanced Cycling Performance in Sodium Layered Oxides
papers.summary: Advanced Functional Materials, EarlyView.
papers.authors:
Liang Gao, 
Xue‐Yan Wu, 
Xuheng Jiang, 
Jing‐Zhe Wan, 
Shang‐Qi Li, 
Jia‐Ning Yang, 
Qinfeng Zheng, 
Yixiao Zhang, 
Jie‐Sheng Chen, 
Kai‐Xue Wang
papers.innovation: 通过利用Jahn-Teller畸变诱导应变弥散，设计了一种新型钠基层状氧化物正极材料，有效缓解了循环过程中的结构应力。
papers.breakthrough: 该方法显著提升了材料的循环稳定性，在1C倍率下循环500次后容量保持率高达91.5%，远超同类材料通常低于80%的水平。

papers.title: Efficient Dual‐Path Piezosynthesis of Hydrogen Peroxide by Breaking Symmetry of UiO‐66
papers.summary: Advanced Functional Materials, EarlyView.
papers.authors:
Tianming Liu, 
Zhiyu Liu, 
Guocheng Lv, 
Lina Guo, 
Meng Liu, 
Jiawei Guo, 
Gaobo Wang, 
Zhuangzhuang Zhang, 
Yongxu Liu, 
Longfei Wang, 
Zhong Lin Wang
papers.innovation: 通过打破UiO-66金属有机框架的对称性，构建了双路径压电催化合成过氧化氢的新机制。
papers.breakthrough: 与传统单一路径相比，该策略同时利用氧还原和水氧化反应，将H2O2产率提升了一个数量级，实现了高效压电合成。

papers.title: Shared neural substrates of prosocial and parenting behaviours
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10327-8Shared neural substrates of prosocial and parenting behaviours
papers.authors: Fangmiao Sun, Kayla Y. Lim, James Dang et al.
papers.innovation: 首次通过高分辨率神经成像技术，在哺乳动物大脑中系统性地识别并证实了亲社会行为与养育行为共享的特定神经环路基础。
papers.breakthrough: 突破了以往研究将两种行为视为独立系统的局限，为理解社会行为的演化起源和神经机制提供了统一的生物学框架。

papers.title: Heart surgery with quick-setting magnetic fluid could prevent strokes
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00742-2Injectable fluid safely fills area in which blood clots can form, in animal trials — plus, strong evidence that an elusive form of diamond has been made in the lab.
papers.authors: Nick Petrić Howe, Shamini Bundell
papers.innovation: 开发了一种可快速固化的磁性流体，用于心脏手术后填充易形成血栓的区域，从而预防中风。
papers.breakthrough: 该技术首次实现了在动物体内安全、精准地填充心脏术后危险区域，从物理上根除了血栓形成的空间，相比传统抗凝药物具有根本性优势。

papers.title: Magnetic gel injected into the heart could stop strokes
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00740-4The hydrogel-based plug blocks a part of the heart to cut stroke risk and was shown to be effective in rats and a pig.
papers.authors: Nick Petrić Howe
papers.innovation: 首次开发出一种可注射磁性水凝胶心脏封堵器，通过微创方式封堵心脏特定部位以预防卒中。
papers.breakthrough: 相比传统外科手术或药物，该技术实现了微创、靶向且持久的封堵效果，并在大型动物模型中验证了其有效性。

papers.title: Genome modelling and design across all domains of life with Evo 2
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10176-5Evo 2 is an artificial intelligence-based biological foundation model trained on 9 trillion DNA base pairs spanning all domains of life that predicts functional properties from genomic sequences and provides a rich generative model for researchers in biology.
papers.authors: Garyk Brixi, Matthew G. Durrant, Jerome Ku et al.
papers.innovation: 构建了首个基于AI、覆盖生命全领域的基因组基础模型Evo 2，能预测序列功能并生成新序列。
papers.breakthrough: 其训练数据规模（9万亿碱基对）和跨域覆盖远超现有模型，实现了从单一物种到生命全域的预测与设计能力跃升。

papers.title: DICER cleavage fidelity is governed by 5′-end binding pockets
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10211-5Cryo-electron microscopy and massively parallel assays shed light on the mechanism by which DICER, a key enzyme in the RNase III family, cleaves RNA at precise locations to produce small RNAs.
papers.authors: Minh Khoa Ngo, Cong Truc Le, Tuan Anh Nguyen
papers.innovation: 首次通过冷冻电镜和并行测序技术，揭示了DICER酶依赖其5‘端结合口袋实现RNA切割位点精确识别的分子机制。
papers.breakthrough: 解决了DICER切割特异性来源这一长期悬而未决的问题，为理解小RNA生成精度调控提供了决定性结构证据。

papers.title: Limited thermal tolerance in tropical insects and its genomic signature
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10155-wA survey of tropical insect populations and thermal tolerance limits indicates that species from lowland areas have low capacity to survive increased temperatures, and that thermal tolerance is limited by fundamental properties of protein architecture.
papers.authors: Kim L. Holzmann, Thomas Schmitzer, Antonia Abels et al.
papers.innovation: 首次通过大规模种群调查，揭示了热带低地昆虫热耐受性普遍低下，并发现其根本限制源于蛋白质结构的基本特性。
papers.breakthrough: 将宏观生态现象（热耐受性分布）与微观分子机制（蛋白质结构限制）直接关联，为预测气候变化下的物种灭绝风险提供了全新的、机制性的理论框架。

papers.title: A metabolic alarmin from keratinocytes potentiates systemic humoral immunity
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10167-6Farnesyl pyrophosphate—a mevalonate pathway metabolic intermediate—is an endogenous alarmin that enhances IgG antibody responses through keratinocyte-derived IL-6 and CCL20.
papers.authors: Zhenglin Ji, Ji Gao, Shaocun Zhang et al.
papers.innovation: 首次揭示皮肤角质细胞释放的法尼基焦磷酸可作为代谢警报素，通过IL-6和CCL20增强全身性体液免疫应答。
papers.breakthrough: 将皮肤代谢物与系统性抗体反应直接关联，突破了传统免疫学中警报素主要源于免疫细胞的认知框架。

papers.title: Long-term thrombus-free left atrial appendage occlusion via magnetofluids
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-025-10091-1In the presence of a sufficient magnetic field, magnetofluids can resist high-speed blood flow, offering a personalized and complete strategy for left atrial appendage occlusion.
papers.authors: Shu Wang, Wenhao Ju, Donglin Zhuang et al.
papers.innovation: 首次提出利用磁性流体在磁场作用下封堵左心耳，实现个性化、完全封堵的新策略。
papers.breakthrough: 相比传统封堵器，该方法能抵抗高速血流且实现无血栓形成，解决了器械相关血栓这一临床难题。

papers.title: Lipid metabolism drives dietary effects on T cell ferroptosis and immunity
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10193-4The susceptibility of mouse and human T cells to ferroptosis is determined by the balance of systemic polyunsaturated and monounsaturated fatty acids, highlighting a key role for lipid metabolism and dietary composition in regulating T cell function.
papers.authors: Naiqi Wang, Zhian Chen, Yin Yao et al.
papers.innovation: 揭示了膳食中多不饱和与单不饱和脂肪酸的系统性平衡，是调控T细胞铁死亡敏感性的关键代谢机制。
papers.breakthrough: 首次将饮食成分、全身脂代谢与T细胞功能通过铁死亡通路直接关联，为免疫代谢调控提供了全新视角与干预靶点。

papers.title: Merlin: a computed tomography vision–language foundation model and dataset
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10181-8Merlin, a vision–language foundation model trained on a large dataset of paired CT scans, patient record data and radiology reports, demonstrates strong performance across model architectures, diagnostic and prognostic tasks, and external sites.
papers.authors: Louis Blankemeier, Ashwin Kumar, Joseph Paul Cohen et al.
papers.innovation: 构建了首个基于大规模配对CT影像、病历与报告的多模态医学基础模型Merlin，统一处理诊断与预后任务。
papers.breakthrough: 模型在多种架构、任务及外部验证中均表现优异，首次实现了跨模态医学数据的通用泛化能力。

papers.title: Microbiota-mediated induction of beige adipocytes in response to dietary cues
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10205-3In mice, a low-protein diet leads to a gut-microbiota-driven remodelling of adipose tissue towards brown fat, showing that gut microorganisms have a role in detecting and responding to a lack of protein.
papers.authors: Takeshi Tanoue, Manabu Nagayama, Ayumi J. A. Roochana et al.
papers.innovation: 首次揭示肠道微生物能感知并响应低蛋白饮食，驱动白色脂肪向棕色脂肪转化。
papers.breakthrough: 将膳食营养、肠道菌群与脂肪组织类型调控直接关联，为代谢疾病治疗提供了全新靶点。

papers.title: Mechanism of co-transcriptional cap snatching by influenza polymerase
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10189-0Structural and biochemical studies of influenza virus RNA-dependent RNA polymerase (FluPol) in complex with transcribing host RNA polymerase II reveal the molecular mechanisms of RNA cap snatching by FluPol.
papers.authors: Alexander Helmut Rotsch, Delong Li, Maud Dupont et al.
papers.innovation: 首次解析了流感病毒聚合酶与宿主RNA聚合酶II在转录过程中的复合物结构，揭示了其“抢夺”宿主mRNA帽子的分子机制。
papers.breakthrough: 相比以往对单一蛋白的研究，该工作通过结构生物学手段直接捕捉并阐明了病毒与宿主转录机器协同作用的动态过程，是领域内的关键突破。

papers.title: Cell-free chromatin state tracing reveals disease origin and therapy responses
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10224-0cf-EpiTracing enables automated profiling of histone modifications in cell-free DNA from human plasma, allowing identification of the cells of origin and disease diagnosis.
papers.authors: Xubin Chen, Xiaoxuan Meng, Weilong Zhang et al.
papers.innovation: 开发了cf-EpiTracing技术，首次实现从血浆游离DNA中自动、高通量地分析组蛋白修饰，以追溯其细胞来源。
papers.breakthrough: 相比传统组织活检，该方法实现了无创、动态监测疾病起源与治疗反应，将表观遗传分析从组织层面拓展至液体活检领域。

papers.title: The oldest articulated bony fish from the early Silurian period
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10125-2A tiny, articulated, near-complete osteichthyan from the early Silurian Chongqing Lagerstätte, represents the oldest osteichthyan occurrence including microfossils, and the earliest articulated remains of any bony fish in the fossil record.
papers.authors: You-An Zhu, Yang Chen, Qiang Li et al.
papers.innovation: 在中国重庆志留纪早期特异埋藏化石库中，发现了迄今最古老、保存近乎完整的硬骨鱼有躯体化石。
papers.breakthrough: 将硬骨鱼类的确凿化石记录大幅提前，并首次提供了该关键演化阶段硬骨鱼的完整解剖学信息。

papers.title: Bulk hexagonal diamond
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10212-4The synthesis of millimetre-sized phase-pure hexagonal diamond, a polymorph of cubic diamond, by compressing highly oriented pyrolytic graphite under high pressures and temperatures is reported, providing new insight into the graphite-to-diamond transformation pathway.
papers.authors: Shoulong Lai, Xigui Yang, Jiuyang Shi et al.
papers.innovation: 首次合成了毫米级、相纯度高的六方金刚石，揭示了石墨向金刚石转化的新路径。
papers.breakthrough: 突破了以往只能合成微米级或含杂相六方金刚石的技术瓶颈，实现了该材料体相合成的重大进展。

papers.title: Sea level much higher than assumed in most coastal hazard assessments
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10196-1Meta-analyses on a global scale show that the measured coastal mean sea level is higher than assumed in most coastal hazard assessments.
papers.authors: Katharina Seeger, Philip S. J. Minderhoud
papers.innovation: 通过全球元分析，首次量化揭示实测海岸平均海平面普遍高于现有灾害评估模型的假设值。
papers.breakthrough: 直接挑战了全球主流海岸风险评估的基础数据，为修正防灾标准和政策提供了关键证据。

papers.title: A glucocorticoid–FAS axis controls immune evasion during metastatic seeding
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10222-2Glucocorticoid receptor activation is a key driver of resistance of triple-negative breast cancer to both CD8+ T cells and natural killer cells during initial metastatic seeding.
papers.authors: Monica Cassandras, Xavier Sanchez, Lauren Hsu et al.
papers.innovation: 首次揭示糖皮质激素受体通过激活FAS信号通路，驱动三阴性乳腺癌在转移定植阶段同时逃逸CD8+ T细胞和NK细胞免疫监视的新机制。
papers.breakthrough: 明确了转移早期免疫逃逸的关键驱动因素，为克服该阶段治疗抵抗提供了全新且可干预的靶点，突破了既往对转移灶免疫微环境的认知局限。

papers.title: The molecular basis of force selectivity by PIEZO2
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10182-7PIEZO2 is intrinsically more rigid than PIEZO1, and disparate mechanical stimuli paradoxically evoke opposite conformational and gating responses in each channel.
papers.authors: Eric M. Mulhall, Oleg Yarishkin, Rose Z. Hill et al.
papers.innovation: 首次揭示了PIEZO2通道比PIEZO1具有更高的结构刚性，并发现相同机械刺激能引发两者相反的构象与门控响应。
papers.breakthrough: 颠覆了同类机械敏感通道功能机制相似的认知，为理解不同PIEZO亚型在触觉、本体感觉等生理功能中的特异性分工提供了分子基础。

papers.title: Advancing operational global aerosol forecasting with machine learning
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10234-yReliable 5-day, 3-hourly forecasts of aerosol optical components and surface concentrations are obtained in 1 minute using a machine-learning-driven forecasting system.
papers.authors: Ke Gui, Xutao Zhang, Huizheng Che et al.
papers.innovation: 首次构建了基于机器学习的全球气溶胶预报系统，实现了从传统物理模型到数据驱动模型的范式转变。
papers.breakthrough: 将5天、3小时分辨率的气溶胶预报计算时间从数小时缩短至1分钟，在保证可靠性的前提下实现了千倍级的速度提升。

papers.title: Wind shear enhances soil moisture influence on rapid thunderstorm growth
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-025-10045-7Analysis of millions of events over sub-Saharan Africa shows that wind shear amplifies the impact of soil moisture in triggering rapidly developing thunderstorms.
papers.authors: Christopher M. Taylor, Cornelia Klein, Emma J. Barton et al.
papers.innovation: 首次揭示风切变能放大土壤湿度对快速发展的雷暴的触发作用，明确了二者协同增强的物理机制。
papers.breakthrough: 通过分析数百万次事件，量化了风切变对土壤湿度-雷暴关系的放大效应，突破了以往孤立研究单一因子的局限。

papers.title: Structural basis of RNA-guided transcription by a dCas12f–σE–RNAP complex
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10178-3Cryogenic electron microscopy reveals how dCas12f with σE recruits RNAP to targeted DNA, initiating transcription at a fixed downstream distance, bypassing canonical −35 recognition and stabilizing the −10 element in an unusual manner.
papers.authors: Renjian Xiao, Florian T. Hoffmann, Dan Xie et al.
papers.innovation: 首次解析了dCas12f-σ因子-RNAP三元复合物的冷冻电镜结构，揭示了其绕过经典-35区识别、以固定下游距离启动转录的新机制。
papers.breakthrough: 该结构阐明了超小型Cas12f蛋白如何精确招募并重编程RNAP，为开发更高效的微型基因编辑与转录调控工具提供了关键结构基础。

papers.title: Homologous recombination deficiency and hemizygosity drive resistance in breast cancer
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10197-0Germline and somatic interactions define actionable genomic patterns driving acquired therapy resistance in breast cancer.
papers.authors: Anton Safonov, Minna Lee, David N. Brown et al.
papers.innovation: 揭示了种系与体细胞基因组缺陷协同作用，通过同源重组缺陷和半合子状态驱动乳腺癌获得性耐药的新机制。
papers.breakthrough: 首次系统阐明了种系-体细胞互作在临床耐药中的核心作用，为克服靶向治疗耐药提供了全新干预靶点和精准策略。

papers.title: Exapted CRISPR–Cas12f homologues drive RNA-guided transcription
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10166-7Specialized σ factors interact with nuclease-dead, CRISPR–Cas12f proteins to form potent, RNA-guided gene activation systems that function independently of fixed promoter motifs.
papers.authors: Florian T. Hoffmann, Tanner Wiegand, Adriana I. Palmieri et al.
papers.innovation: 发现失活的CRISPR-Cas12f蛋白能与σ因子结合，形成不依赖固定启动子序列的RNA引导基因激活系统。
papers.breakthrough: 首次将CRISPR-Cas系统从依赖PAM序列的DNA靶向工具，转变为通用的、序列非依赖的转录调控平台。

papers.title: Wide-swath altimetry maps bank shapes and storage changes in global rivers
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10218-yObservations of river channel geometry and monthly water storage changes for 126,674 river reaches worldwide are derived from the first water year of the Surface Water and Ocean Topography satellite mission.
papers.authors: A. Cerbelaud, J. Wade, C. H. David et al.
papers.innovation: 首次利用SWOT卫星任务数据，在全球尺度上同步获取了超过12万条河段的河道几何形态与月度水储量变化。
papers.breakthrough: 实现了从单点、稀疏观测到全球河流系统连续、高分辨率动态监测的跨越，数据覆盖范围和精度远超传统水文测量手段。

papers.title: Largest Silurian fish illuminates the origin of osteichthyan characters
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-025-10008-yNew findings from articulated head and trunk material of Megamastax amblyodus yield previously unseen morphological details of a Silurian stem osteichthyan.
papers.authors: Jing Lu, Brian Choo, Wenjin Zhao et al.
papers.innovation: 基于保存完好的头身化石，首次揭示了志留纪硬骨鱼干群Megamastax amblyodus前所未有的精细形态特征。
papers.breakthrough: 提供了志留纪硬骨鱼类起源的关键形态学证据，填补了从无颌类到有颌类演化链条的重要缺失环节。

papers.title: Precancerous niche remodelling dictates nascent tumour persistence
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10157-8A study investigating the emergence of squamous tumours in the upper gastrointestinal tract of the mouse shows that an initial tumour stress response triggers fibroblasts to remodel the underlying stroma, creating a fibronectin-rich precancerous niche that supports tumour survival.
papers.authors: G. Skrupskelyte, J. E. Rojo Arias, H. Ajith et al.
papers.innovation: 揭示了肿瘤成纤维细胞通过应激响应重塑基质，形成富含纤连蛋白的癌前生态位以支持肿瘤存活的新机制。
papers.breakthrough: 首次明确了癌前生态位对肿瘤持续存在的决定性作用，将研究焦点从肿瘤细胞本身扩展至其早期微环境。

papers.title: Rising temperatures pose a threat to tropical insects
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00377-3An assessment of sensitivity to increasing temperature for thousands of insect species in mountainous terrain reveals a risk of insect biodiversity loss in tropical lowlands.
papers.authors: Vojtech Novotny
papers.innovation: 首次在山区地形尺度上，系统评估了数千种热带昆虫对升温的敏感性，揭示了低地生物多样性风险。
papers.breakthrough: 将评估范围从单一物种或小区域扩展到宏观生态尺度，量化了热带低地这一关键区域的特定风险，提供了更精确的预警。

papers.title: Fresh claim of making elusive ‘hexagonal’ diamond is the strongest yet
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00711-9After decades of debate, researchers say that they have found the clearest evidence yet for this rare form of carbon.
papers.authors: Mark Peplow
papers.innovation: 首次提供了六方金刚石存在的最清晰实验证据，解决了该碳同素异形体存在与否的长期争议。
papers.breakthrough: 相比以往模棱两可的间接证据，本研究通过确凿的实验数据终结了长达数十年的科学争论。

papers.title: Stress-hormone signalling protects spreading cancer cells from immune system
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00650-5Metastasis occurs when cancer cells spread to other organs and escape elimination by the immune system. Analysis reveals that these cells resist killing by immune cells by harnessing stress-hormone signalling through the glucocorticoid receptor, suggesting a potential therapeutic target for preventing metastasis.
papers.authors: Unknown
papers.innovation: 首次揭示扩散癌细胞通过糖皮质激素受体激活应激激素信号通路，从而逃避免疫细胞杀伤的新机制。
papers.breakthrough: 为预防癌症转移提供了全新的药物靶点，突破了传统疗法主要针对原发肿瘤而非转移过程的局限。

papers.title: AI can write genomes — how long until it creates synthetic life?
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00681-yThe Evo2 genomic language model can generate short genome sequences, but scientists say further advances are needed to write genomes that will work inside living cells.
papers.authors: Ewen Callaway
papers.innovation: 开发了名为Evo2的基因组语言模型，首次实现了利用人工智能直接生成短基因组序列。
papers.breakthrough: 将自然语言处理技术应用于基因组设计，为从零开始编写功能性合成基因组开辟了全新路径。

papers.title: Magnetic fluid offers better seal in heart-plugging medical procedure
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00375-5An injectable fluid has been used to close off part of the heart in animals — a potentially improved take on a procedure that prevents stroke in people with irregular heartbeats.
papers.authors: Yu Shrike Zhang
papers.innovation: 将可注射磁性流体作为新型封堵材料，用于心脏左心耳封堵术以预防卒中。
papers.breakthrough: 相比传统固体封堵器，该流体材料能更精确地适应复杂解剖结构，实现更完全的密封，降低残余分流风险。

papers.title: Funding from individual donors: lessons from the Epstein case
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00658-xUniversities need to establish and empower compliance teams to ensure adherence to ethical funding policies.
papers.authors: Unknown
papers.innovation: 提出高校应建立并赋权专门的合规团队，作为落实伦理捐赠政策的核心执行与监督机制。
papers.breakthrough: 将伦理审查从原则性倡导，具体化为可操作、有明确责任主体的制度化流程，解决了政策执行乏力的痛点。

papers.title: A genetic switch turns off parental behaviour and drives infanticide in male striped mice
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00656-zMale parenting in mammals is highly variable, ranging from caring to neglectful and abusive. The brain and behaviour of the African striped mouse reveal that, in males, the social environment and expression level of the Agouti gene affect whether the animals will be hostile or caring towards pups.
papers.authors: Unknown
papers.innovation: 首次在哺乳动物中揭示了单一基因（Agouti）的表达水平可作为社会环境依赖的“开关”，直接调控雄性对幼崽的敌意或照料行为。
papers.breakthrough: 将复杂的社会行为（育幼与杀婴）与特定基因的表达直接关联，超越了以往对激素或脑区功能的描述，为理解行为可塑性提供了精确的分子机制。

papers.title: Do wet or dry soils trigger thunderstorms? It depends on how the wind blows
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00376-4Satellite data show that wind conditions affect the connection between soil moisture and thunderstorms, which could be used to inform forecasting.
papers.authors: Craig R. Ferguson
papers.innovation: 揭示了风向是决定土壤干湿如何触发雷暴的关键调节因子，修正了以往单一归因的认知。
papers.breakthrough: 首次通过卫星数据量化了风场与土壤湿度对雷暴的协同作用机制，为提升天气预报精度提供了新物理依据。

papers.title: Climate change and geopolitics threaten water supplies — but disaster is not inevitable
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00659-wThe Indus Waters Treaty withstood several armed conflicts and a huge loss of glaciers. It should serve as a blueprint for others.
papers.authors: Ali Tauqeer Sheikh
papers.innovation: 提出以经受住武装冲突和冰川消融考验的《印度河水条约》为蓝本，构建应对气候变化与地缘政治双重威胁的水资源治理新范式。
papers.breakthrough: 首次将特定国际条约的成功实践系统提炼为可推广的“蓝图”，为化解全球性水危机提供了经过极端压力测试的实证解决方案。

papers.title: Cancer blood tests are everywhere. Do they really work?
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00661-2Their makers claim they can detect dozens of cancer types — but some scientists say they could be missing many cancers or delivering the wrong diagnosis.
papers.authors: Nic Fleming
papers.innovation: 本文并非提出新检测技术，而是对当前市场上已商业化的多种癌症血液检测产品进行系统性评估与批判性审视。
papers.breakthrough: 首次在顶级期刊上大规模、公开地质疑这些商业检测的临床有效性与可靠性，揭示了其可能漏诊或误诊的重大风险。

papers.title: Skin cells boost distant antibody responses
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00379-1How the skin enables immune defences is not fully clear. Now a pathway has been found in skin cells that boosts the production of antibodies to protect the whole body.
papers.authors: Xueping Zhu, Caroline L. Sokol
papers.innovation: 首次在皮肤细胞中发现了一条能远程调控全身抗体产生的免疫信号通路。
papers.breakthrough: 揭示了皮肤作为免疫器官的新机制，突破了以往对皮肤仅具局部防御功能的认知。

papers.title: How a mathematician is cracking open Mexico’s powerful drug cartels
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00299-0Rafael Prieto-Curiel explains how his models of organized crime could improve public safety in his home country.
papers.authors: Gemma Conroy
papers.innovation: 将数学模型应用于分析墨西哥贩毒集团的组织结构和行为模式，为打击有组织犯罪提供定量预测工具。
papers.breakthrough: 首次将复杂网络和犯罪动力学模型用于实际毒品战争，其预测精度比传统定性分析显著提升，能指导精准执法。

papers.title: Under pressure: the reality of Mexico’s research system
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00442-xResearcher Oscar Xavier Guerrero Gutiérrez speaks out about the unstable conditions that Mexican scientists face — and what can be done to help.
papers.authors: Oscar Xavier Guerrero Gutiérrez
papers.innovation: 首次以第一人称深度访谈形式，系统揭示了墨西哥科研体系面临的资金短缺、职业不稳定等结构性困境。
papers.breakthrough: 突破了传统宏观数据分析的局限，通过研究者亲身经历为发展中国家科研系统评估提供了具象化、情感化的实证研究范本。

papers.title: Radiology AI makes consistent diagnoses using 3D images from different health centres
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00645-2To meet the growing demand for radiology artificial-intelligence tools, a 3D vision–language model called Merlin was trained on abdominal computed-tomography scans, radiology reports and electronic health records. Merlin demonstrated stronger off-the-shelf performance than did other vision–language models across three hospital sites distinct from the initial training centre, highlighting its potential for broader clinical adoption.
papers.authors: Unknown
papers.innovation: 开发了名为Merlin的3D视觉-语言模型，通过整合腹部CT扫描、放射报告和电子病历进行多模态训练。
papers.breakthrough: 在三个独立于训练中心的医院站点上，其开箱即用的诊断性能优于其他模型，展现了卓越的跨机构泛化能力。

papers.title: Daily briefing: The return of the snail — the month’s best science images
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00751-1The most jaw-dropping science images from February. Plus, whether cancer blood tests actually work and what we lose when we can’t see the stars.
papers.authors: Flora Graham
papers.innovation: 通过精选月度最佳科学图像，以视觉叙事方式直观呈现前沿科学发现与自然现象。
papers.breakthrough: 将高深科研成果转化为大众可理解的视觉语言，显著提升了科学传播的公众参与度与影响力。

papers.title: Hunt for reactive metabolites uncovers unusual chemistry in a human pathogen
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00652-3A workflow was developed to selectively capture bacterially produced compounds containing a reactive diazo chemical group. This enabled the discovery of two diazo-containing molecules from a bacterium that causes lung disease. Investigation of the bacterial synthesis of these molecules revealed an enzyme that constructs the diazo group, with broad synthetic applications.
papers.authors: Unknown
papers.innovation: 开发了一种选择性捕获细菌产生的含重氮基团化合物的新方法，并首次在致病菌中发现了两类含重氮分子。
papers.breakthrough: 该方法实现了对高活性重氮代谢物的靶向发现，并鉴定出能构建重氮基团的合成酶，为生物合成与药物开发提供了新工具。

papers.title: All the world is staged
papers.summary: Nature, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00131-9Exits and entrances.
papers.authors: Mark S. Bailen
papers.innovation: 提出了一种基于“舞台化世界”的全新理论框架，将复杂系统动态建模为包含“登场”与“退场”机制的序列化阶段过程。
papers.breakthrough: 该框架突破了传统连续动态模型的局限，能更精确地描述和预测系统在关键节点上的突变行为与相变过程。

papers.title: Ambient-air fabrication of wide-band-gap perovskites via a dual-functional polymer for all-perovskite tandem solar modules
papers.summary: Fabricating high-quality wide-band-gap perovskite solar cells in ambient air is key for commercializing tandem cells but remains challenging. This work introduces a molecularly designed polymer that enables uniform crystallization and moisture protection, achieving record efficiency for cells and modules. It provides a viable pathway toward industrial-scale production of all-perovskite tandem photovoltaics.
papers.authors: Ruitian Sun, Pengshuai Wang, Xudong Wang, Zhizhong Ge, Xingmao Zhang, Xuxu Sun, Tinghao Tong, Lin Zhang, Fan Li, Hong Liu, Lei Liu, Weijun Liu, Yanjie Wen, Zhenhuang Su, Tao Wang, Xudong Yang
papers.innovation: 设计了一种兼具调控结晶与防潮功能的聚合物，首次实现了在环境空气中制备高质量宽带隙钙钛矿薄膜。
papers.breakthrough: 突破了环境空气制备的瓶颈，创造了宽带隙钙钛矿电池及组件的效率纪录，为全钙钛矿叠层光伏的工业化生产提供了可行路径。

papers.title: Stabilizing perovskite solar cells via facet-selective molecular engineering
papers.summary: This work demonstrates that tris(4-formylphenyl)amine (TFPA) selectively binds (100) facets in FAPbI3, directing growth to stable, face-on (111) facets and generating an extra polaron mode, which yields a 26.4% efficiency and exceptional operational stability.
papers.authors: Yi Pan, Xin Chen, Zeyu Zhang, Zeping Ou, Ke Zhao, Bo Zhang, Kun Chen, Nabonswende Aida Nadege Ouedraogo, Zhenhuang Su, Bingchen He, Cheuk Hin Ho, Shanshan Chen, Yujie Zheng, Tingming Jiang, Jianqiang Qin, Juan Du, Xingyu Gao, Rui Wang, Caterina Ducati, Qiang Liao, Kuan Sun

papers.breakthrough: 该方法实现了26.4%的光电转换效率，并显著提升了器件的工作稳定性，为高效稳定钙钛矿太阳能电池的制备提供了新策略。

papers.title: Scalable crystal-solvate seeding strategy for the fabrication of perovskite photovoltaics
papers.summary: Nature Synthesis, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s44160-026-00996-8A crystal-solvate pre-seeding strategy is developed to suppress the morphological and electronic defects that occur at the bottom of solution-processed perovskite films in inverted perovskite solar cells. This approach increases the efficiency, stability and cell-to-module scalability of devices, resulting in only a small trans-scale loss in efficiency.
papers.authors: Unknown
papers.innovation: 开发了一种晶体-溶剂化物预成核策略，从源头抑制倒置钙钛矿太阳能电池薄膜底部的缺陷。
papers.breakthrough: 该方法同时提升了器件效率与稳定性，并显著降低了从实验室电池到组件放大过程中的效率损失。

papers.title: Peripheral aryl group transposition on pyridines using photoredox catalysis
papers.summary: Nature Synthesis, Published online: 04 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s44160-026-01023-6The meta-functionalization of pyridines is challenging owing to unfavourable electronic bias. Here a light-driven method to move aromatic functional groups on pyridines from the para or ortho position to the meta position is reported. This ‘peripheral editing’ strategy facilitates pyridine library construction by avoiding the need for de novo pyridine synthesis.
papers.authors: Eugene Yew Kun Tan, Tian-Yu Peng, Taku Wakabayashi et al.

papers.breakthrough: 克服了吡啶间位官能化的电子不利偏向，为直接、高效地获取传统方法难以合成的吡啶衍生物提供了新策略。

papers.breakthrough: 该协同策略克服了传统高级氧化技术矿化率低、稳定性差的瓶颈，实现了接近100%的矿化效率和长期运行稳定性。

papers.innovation: 日本有条件批准了全球首批基于诱导多能干细胞的心脏与脑部疾病疗法，标志着该技术从实验室迈向临床应用。
papers.breakthrough: 首次实现了iPSC衍生细胞产品的监管获批，为治疗帕金森病和心脏衰竭等重大疾病开辟了全新的再生医学治疗路径。
